description_long: This sculpture depicts a robed human figure standing upright on a rounded, decorated base. The figure appears to be female, with soft facial features and a head covering or elaborate hairstyle. The drapery of the garment is intricately carved, with folds cascading down the front and sides, giving a sense of movement and depth. The right arm is bent, holding an object close to the chest, while the left arm is relaxed by the side. The back of the sculpture is less detailed, with the robe's folds continuing but with a smoother finish. The surface is a pale, weathered stone with subtle reddish-brown patina in crevices, suggesting age and exposure.
description: A weathered stone sculpture of a robed human figure, standing on a decorated base with detailed drapery and a serene expression.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, detailed drapery, and the object held in the right hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the drapery and the profile of the head and base.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the robe, less detailed but showing the overall form and hair or head covering.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the figure's profile, the arm position, and the layered folds of the garment.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting is visible; the sculpture is isolated against a plain background.
